summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hero+Pipeline Unification (iteration 221). All 15 features verified: 1) PipelineHero NOT rendered (correctly removed), 2) MomentumInsight ('What changed since your last update') visible at top, 3) 'YOUR PIPELINE' section label visible, 4) Emory is FIRST card in Act Now with hero styling (red bg tint rgba(239,68,68,0.016), 4px left border, bigger padding), 5) Emory shows 'Needs attention now' and '4 days overdue' badges on separate row, 6) Other Act Now cards (Stanford, Florida) have normal styling (no 'Needs attention now' badge), 7) Section labels: 'ACT NOW', 'KEEP THINGS MOVING', 'JUST KEEP AN EYE', 8) All cards have 'View school →' CTA, 9) Each card shows: school name + stage context + ONE status + ONE action + CTA, 10) No 'Flagged in recap' text anywhere, 11) 'View full breakdown' navigates to /recap, 12) Card click navigates to /pipeline/{program_id}, 13) Swipeable cards present (5 found), 14) Pipeline toggle switches between PriorityBoard and KanbanBoard, 15) Mobile responsive at 390px - all content visible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero+Pipeline Unification testing complete (iteration 221). Key changes verified: 1) PipelineHero component no longer rendered (removed from PipelinePage JSX), 2) MomentumInsight moved up to right after page header as context layer, 3) Top priority card (Emory) has isHeroPriority=true → bigger padding (22px), red bg tint, 4px left border, badges on separate row, 4) Clear flow: Context → Top priority → Next actions → Supporting → Monitor. Key files: PipelinePage.js (removed PipelineHero render), PriorityBoard.js (ActNowCard hero styling), MomentumInsight.js (context layer). 5 schools in pipeline: Emory (high/act now, hero), Stanford (high/act now), Florida (high/act now), UCLA (medium/keep things moving), Creighton (low/just keep an eye).
